meta.title: Francisco Sousa — Web Development
meta.description: Fast, modern websites for businesses. Starting at €300. Delivered in 5 days. Get a free quote today.

hero.label: Software Engineer
hero.subtitle: You work directly with me — no agency, no middlemen. Fixed pricing, fast delivery, and a result tailored to your business.

about.label: About me
about.bio1: I grew up in Cascais, always between skating and computers. Today I run my own skate school and spend the rest of my time coding — basically doing the two things I enjoy most.
about.bio2: I'm a computer engineer and I build platforms, apps, and websites. I also have my own projects in the works, like My Lessons. I work directly with you, no agencies in between.
about.bio3: I like taking an idea and building it from scratch. If you need someone who handles everything — design, code, launch — that's me.
about.value_payment_desc: You only pay when you're happy

services.label: Services
services.subtitle: Fixed pricing. No surprises. 50% to start, 50% on delivery.

page.title: Landing Page
page.description: Perfect for any business that wants a professional, fast, and conversion-optimized online presence — designed to turn visitors into customers.
features: Custom, modern design tailored to your brand
Fully responsive on mobile, tablet, and desktop
Google Maps integration with business location
Full SEO + Google Business profile setup
Speed optimized — loads in under 1 second

website.title: Full Website
website.description: For businesses that need multiple pages, advanced features, and full control over their content — everything built to scale your digital presence.
features: Everything in the Landing Page plan
Content management system — edit text and images without coding
Google Analytics and Search Console configured
Advanced SEO with meta tags, sitemap, and schema markup

app.title: Mobile App
app.description: End-to-end solution for businesses that need a native iOS and Android app — from design to app store publishing, with an admin panel included.
features: Custom app with exclusive design for your brand
Works on iPhone and Android from a single codebase
Web-based admin panel to manage content and users
Push notifications to engage your customers
Integration with APIs and external services
App Store and Google Play publishing included
Timeline and budget defined after initial consultation

webapp.title: Web App
webapp.description: Custom web applications with real-time features, user dashboards, and complex business logic — accessible from any browser, no app store needed.
features: Custom web application tailored to your workflow
Responsive — works on desktop, tablet, and mobile
Admin panel to manage users and content
Timeline and budget defined after initial consultation

steps.title: Discovery
steps.description: A 15-minute chat to understand your business, your goals, and what you actually need.

steps.title: Proposal
steps.description: Within 24 hours you get a clear proposal: what we'll build, how much it costs, and when it'll be ready.

steps.title: Build
steps.description: I develop your project with regular updates. You see the progress, I do the work.

steps.title: Launch
steps.description: Delivery, testing, and live. I stay available for support after launch.

items.title: My Lessons
items.description: Full-featured tutoring management app built with Flutter. Includes lesson scheduling, payment tracking, student profiles, session history, and automatic notifications. Intuitive interface designed for private tutors and study centers.
items.result: Published on the App Store and Google Play. Lighthouse performance score 100/100.
items.challenge: Private tutors were managing lessons, payments, and students across spreadsheets and notes — with no centralized way to track sessions or billing.
items.solution: A native mobile app built with Flutter that centralizes all tutoring management in one place, with automatic notifications and real-time sync via Firebase.

items.title: Website with digital menu & reservations
items.description: Complete restaurant website with an interactive digital menu, online reservation system, photo gallery, opening hours, and Google Maps integration. SEO optimized for local search — the client appeared on Google's first page within two weeks.
items.result: PageSpeed 100/100. First page of Google in 2 weeks. +40% online reservations.
items.challenge: The restaurant relied solely on phone calls for reservations and had no digital presence — losing customers who searched online.
items.solution: A fast, locally SEO-optimized website with an interactive digital menu and integrated online reservation system, eliminating phone dependency.

items.title: Dental clinic website
items.description: Professional page for a dental clinic featuring service descriptions, medical team profiles, appointment booking form, and Google Business integration. Clean, trustworthy design tailored for the healthcare sector.
items.result: PageSpeed 100/100. 60% increase in appointment requests via website.
items.challenge: The clinic had no website and relied entirely on word-of-mouth — new patients couldn't find information or book appointments online.
items.solution: A professional, trustworthy website with an integrated booking form and Google Business, positioning the clinic as the go-to digital reference in the area.

items.title: Real estate agency website
items.description: Multi-page website with property listings, search filters, individual property pages with photo galleries, location maps, and contact forms. Admin panel to add and edit properties without coding.
items.result: PageSpeed 98/100. 3x more leads in the first month vs. previous real estate portal.
items.challenge: The agency used a generic real estate portal with an outdated design and no brand control — their properties were lost among hundreds of listings.
items.solution: A custom-branded website with an intuitive admin panel and individual property pages, giving full control over the client experience.

items.quote: I needed a website for my business and Francisco delivered everything in 5 days. I started getting inquiries in the first week.
items.name: Maria

items.quote: My old site didn't work on mobile. Francisco rebuilt everything — now I get quote requests every day through the contact form.
items.name: João

items.quote: Fixed price from the start, no surprises. The app turned out exactly how I wanted and it's already on the App Store.
items.name: Ana

guarantee.label: Guarantee
guarantee.title: Zero risk for you
guarantee.subtitle1: Pay 50% to start, 50% on delivery. See the progress at every stage.
guarantee.subtitle2: You only pay the second half when you're

items.question: How much does it cost per month after?
items.answer: Nothing. First-year hosting is included. After that, hosting costs less than €10/month — and I'll help you set everything up. There are never any monthly fees for my work.

items.question: How long does it take?
items.answer: A simple landing page is ready in 3–5 business days. A full website takes 1–2 weeks. I use the Agile Method — a proven process to ship fast without cutting corners.

items.question: I already have Instagram — why do I need a website?
items.answer: Instagram doesn't show up on Google. When someone searches for your type of business, they find whoever has a website — not whoever has an Instagram page. A website is your 24/7 storefront.

items.question: Do I need a domain and hosting?
items.answer: I take care of everything. First-year hosting is included in the price.

items.question: Can I update the content myself?
items.answer: Yes. I include a simple system for editing text and images — no coding required.

items.question: Can I see examples before we start?
items.answer: Absolutely. Before building anything, I'll show you a design mockup for approval. I only move forward once you're happy with it.

items.question: Do you work remotely?
items.answer: Yes. I work remotely with clients anywhere in the world. We meet via WhatsApp or video call — it works perfectly.

items.question: What if I don't like the result?
items.answer: I show you the progress at every stage. You only pay the second installment when you're 100% satisfied. Zero risk.

items.question: What happens after the 30 days of support?
items.answer: Your site stays online as normal. Hosting costs less than €10/month after the first year. If you need changes or updates down the road, I'm just a WhatsApp message away.

contact.title: Let's work together.
